failedAssertions.reason: Streaming responses close connections properly - Test failed due to missing authentication credentials. Pre-existing CLOSE_WAIT connections (5) detected at baseline.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: FastAPI server not running on localhost:8000 - cannot test connection leak behavior under concurrent load
FastAPI server not running on localhost:8000 - cannot measure server memory stability under load

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for API Testing with isolation strategy, concurrency limits (max 3), and testing approach for m2-resource-management assertions

httpClientConfig.notes: Verified through main.py source code inspection. Shared HTTP client properly configured with correct limits (max_connections=100, max_keepalive_connections=20, keepalive_expiry=30.0) and proper shutdown cleanup.

connectionManagement.notes: m2-a4 validation contract wording was misleading - milestone requires REMOVING Connection: close header (not adding it), which is correctly implemented. m2-a3 failed due to missing authentication in test. m2-a6 and m2-a7 verified through source code inspection.

concurrentLoad.notes: Server not running on localhost:8000. Test infrastructure (httpx, psutil, asyncio) is working correctly and ready to execute once server is available.

recommendations.description: Start FastAPI server on localhost:8000 before running user testing validation to enable runtime testing of m2-a8 and m2-a9
Fix m2-a3 test to include valid API key authentication for proper streaming connection testing
Update validation contract for m2-a4 to clarify that Connection: close header should be ABSENT (not present) per milestone requirements
Investigate and clean up 5 pre-existing CLOSE_WAIT connections detected at baseline
